favourite.name: [LIGHT]A>> [/LIGHT][COLOR whitesmoke]Audio cleaners[/COLOR][COLOR gray] :[/COLOR][COLOR deepskyblue] Demagnetizing[/COLOR][COLOR gray] +[/COLOR] Warm-up[COLOR gray] +[/COLOR] Burn-in
[LIGHT]K>> [/LIGHT][COLOR gray]add-ons :[/COLOR] Install from zip file[LIGHT][COLOR dimgray][I] (addons://install/)[/I][/LIGHT][/COLOR]
[LIGHT]M>> [/LIGHT][COLOR gold]Aliunde[/COLOR][COLOR darkgray] k19 GUI[COLOR gold] Maintenance Wizard[/COLOR] Original[/COLOR][LIGHT][I] (clear + speedtest + backup + restore)[/I][/LIGHT]
[LIGHT]R>> [/LIGHT][COLOR darkgray]Easy Repo Installer[/COLOR][LIGHT][I] (search and add multiple sources)[/I][/LIGHT]
[LIGHT]R>> [/LIGHT][COLOR darkgray]Git[COLOR steelblue]Hub[/COLOR] Browser[/COLOR][LIGHT][I] (install add-ons distributed through GitHub)[/I][/LIGHT]

[LIGHT]R>> [/LIGHT][COLOR limegreen]R[/COLOR][COLOR darkgray]epo[COLOR limegreen] o[/COLOR]f[COLOR limegreen] a[/COLOR]ll[COLOR limegreen] R[/COLOR]epositories[/COLOR][LIGHT][I] (uses Kodi add-on repository method)[/I][/LIGHT]
[LIGHT]T>> [/LIGHT][COLOR gray]thumbnails :[/COLOR] Program Executable[COLOR gray] add-ons[/COLOR][LIGHT][COLOR dimgray][I] (addons://sources/executable/)[/I][/LIGHT][/COLOR]
